tasks.subject: Task 1: Heal-on-read setdefault + endpoint 404 guard
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single commit: setdefault('crawl_id', crawl_id) in get_job_or_recover early-return + None-check + 404 raise in get_crawl_status.

**Files:**
- Modify: apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py

**Verify:** `python -m py_compile` clean

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py"], "verifyCommand": "python -m py_compile apps-microservices/crawler-service/app/router/crawler.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["setdefault('crawl_id', crawl_id)", "None-check raises 404", "response_model unchanged", "disk-recovery branch untouched", "plural untouched", "py_compile passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Manual verification (docker smoke + production retest)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Docker smoke + production retest /status/6664.

**Files:** None modified.

**Verify:** curl responses + log evidence per spec §6.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "curl -i https://<crawler-service>/status/6664", "acceptanceCriteria": ["smoke malformed -> 200 or 404", "smoke healthy -> 200", "plural still 200", "production /status/6664 no 500", "no ResponseValidationError 24h"]}
```
